params.name: Bronze Bird
params.description:
On Oct 15, 212 AD, Minister Cao Cao built the Bronze Lark Terrace as a Bronze Larks was found in Chang'an.
After Cao Cao wiped out the Yuan brothers, he saw a golden light rising from the ground in Yecheng and found a Bronze Lark. He then ordered the construction of the Bronze Lark Terrace on Zhangshui to demonstrate his ability to rule the world. The building is 27-foot high, with a 10-foot high platform and five 15-foot high floors. The windows are decorated with copper and reflect light at …
